title: Vivian — recurring flirty banter (post-bond)
prompt: Vivian leans against a doorframe, watching the hero with that small slow smile she gets when she's thinking three things at once. "You look like a man with a problem. Or a question. Or — " she tilts her head — "some money you don't know what to do with. I can help with all three."

choices.label: Flirt back
choices.resolutionHint: Banter for a beat. She enjoys it. He enjoys it. Nothing happens — but something is being built.

choices.label: Ask her for advice or help
choices.resolutionHint: She gives a real answer. The flirt drops; the trust deposits.

choices.label: Tell her you're busy and walk past
choices.resolutionHint: Her smile cools by half a degree. She doesn't push. But the next time she sees him she'll smile a fraction less.
